candidate.name: retry-correct-qrs_duration
candidate.description: Temporary corrective feature-level bundle for `qrs_duration` derived from a failed attempt and gold-answer supervision.
input_requirements: verified sampling frequency for duration claims
candidate.procedure_summary: Retry-only correction workflow: verify `qrs_duration` with the smallest valid evidence path, then read target lead waveform before drawing a feature conclusion; slice the narrowest ECG segment associated with the feature; consume ECGdeli feature-level measurement output for the target feature; route morphology-sensitive verification to the visual ECG tool; verify sampling frequency and convert sample span into duration only after confirmation.
candidate.applicability: Use when the task depends on verifying `qrs_duration` through a reusable feature-level workflow.
failure_modes: qrs_duration evidence is mapped to the wrong answer option
task-specific answer text is copied instead of re-deriving evidence
sampling frequency is assumed instead of verified
segment boundaries are reused without checking they match the feature
visual-tool output is treated as direct truth instead of supporting evidence
